tagline: Your Trusted Property Partner in Braj Bhoomi
bio:
Mohit Mittal is a dedicated Property Advisor based in Faridabad with years of hands-on experience in the real estate markets of Vrindavan, Mathura, Barsana, and Govardhan. With an in-depth knowledge of the Braj Bhoomi region, Mohit has guided hundreds of families and investors in finding the right property — whether a residential plot, a luxury villa, or a premium apartment.

At Shree Jee Realestate, the mission is simple: connect every client with the right property, at the right location, and at the right price. Transparency, trust, and local expertise are the values that drive every deal.
heroTitle: Find Your Perfect Property in Braj Bhoomi
heroSubtitle: Premium plots, villas & apartments in Vrindavan, Mathura, Barsana & Govardhan.
